description_long: This is a modern, rectangular chaise upholstered in a deep teal or dark green fabric, featuring a minimalist and boxy silhouette. The backrest and armrests are of equal height, forming a continuous, squared enclosure around the seating area. The seat is wide and flat, with subtle tufting details visible on the backrest, adding a touch of sophistication. The chaise stands on four short, tapered black legs, which slightly elevate it off the ground and contribute to its contemporary look. The upholstery appears smooth and solid, with no visible patterns except for the tufted buttons. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, public waiting areas, or stylish outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, boxy chaise in deep teal fabric with tufted backrest and short black legs, featuring a minimalist, enclosed design. The upholstery is smooth and solid, with subtle button tufting for detail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the chaise, highlighting the tufted backrest, wide seat, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view displays the solid, rectangular armrest and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the plain, unadorned backrest and both armrests extending equally.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and seat depth from the opposite side.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, of medium height, and runs the full width of the chaise, featuring subtle button tufting for a refined look. It is visually continuous with the armrests, creating a boxy, enclosed shape.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, matching the height and thickness of the backrest, and are rectangular in shape.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and tapered, finished in black, and are positioned at each corner for stability. They have a minimalist, modern appearance with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid in color with a smooth texture, featuring subtle button tufting on the backrest but no visible printed or woven patterns.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, wide seat cushion integrated into the base, with the backrest and armrests padded but not featuring separate, loose cushions. The arrangement is simple and streamlined.
